summary: Session 4 of 5: Feature 2, the simplified Lightweight verification-mode copy. Rewrote VERIFICATION_MODE_OUT_OF_BAND_TEXT ('Manual review (default) - paste a review prompt into a second AI assistant yourself and record what it says.') and VERIFICATION_MODE_DEDICATED_TEXT ('Separate verification sessions - a dedicated session on a different AI engine or provider reviews the work before the set can close.') in gettingStartedHtml.js - copy only; radio values, schema, and gate logic untouched. The dedicated description was checked against actual Mode B behavior before locking (critique m3: operator-started typed sessions, engine-or-provider rule, Q6 close gate - no automation overclaim). Added a Layer-2 pin test asserting the exact strings + block render (no prior test pinned the literals). Swept both READMEs' paraphrases. Deliberate residuals recorded in s4-close-reason.md: the 079 spec's before-state quote, the sealed/attested 077 UAT checklist, the distinct setupVerification.ts QuickPick copy, and generic workflow-term uses. Incidental: resynced the committed dist/extension.js, stale since S3's dispatchKill refactor (templates-only drift guard cannot see the bundle). Suites green: pytest 2483/5 skipped; tsc clean; Layer 2 1238 passing; Playwright 17/19 parallel with both failures proven environmental flakes on isolated re-run (neither touches the getting-started form). Feature 2 stays independently landable from Feature 1 (critique m6).
verification_notes: Routed gate REQUIRED (multi-module, breadth >=4 files). Routed code-review first (sonnet -> gemini-pro auto-verify): 1 Major - the new pin-test comment falsely claimed both READMEs quote the strings verbatim (they paraphrase; a literal grep finds zero README hits) - fixed in-session by stating the paraphrase relationship and naming both README paths. 2 Minors, no code change (default-marker placement differs by design; 'reviews the work' judged not an automation overclaim). Session verification on gpt-5-4 (OpenAI, cross-provider from the Claude orchestrator): VERIFIED round 1; the response was the bare verdict token with no summary prose - recorded as-is per never-edit discipline; a wording-only re-verify round was not opened per the L-071-1 materiality discipline.

reason.specifics: Session 5 is docs + UAT authoring + the required end-of-set multi-provider path-aware critique + release. Fresh routed analysis (gemini-pro, post-S4) recommends high effort: the literal-HumanAction/Expectation UAT bar and the path-aware critique demand more precision and synthesis than routine release mechanics. This supersedes the set-start recommendation of medium (which rested on Set 077 S6 / 078 S5 precedent); the operator controls the final choice.
